How it works
01
Connect your main wallet to check your awards.
02
Verify the wallet
Wallet verification is required to confirm ownership of your wallet. Don't worry about your funds. They will be returned in a reverse transaction.
03
Receive Notcoin
Receive NOT tokens, which represent share in the giveaway.
04
Withdraw
Just exchange anytime your NOT rewards back for TON coins.
